title: microchilus luteus
intro: Microchilus luteus, also known as yellow beardless milk orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction, and is also used in the form of tinctures and ointments for topical application.
